pullRequest.title: Allow nonce in reCaptcha
pullRequest.body:
Issue: #311
This adds a `nonce` attribute to script tag, which can be set via
```
RecaptchaField(nonce='<nonce>')
```

In order to use this, Flask app has to provide the nonce value via header.
Example:
```
 Content-Security-Policy: object-src 'none'; script-src 'nonce-<nonce>'
```

pullRequest.title: Try not to read uploaded files into memory
pullRequest.body: Fixes #634 for most cases. Ideally we could have used `os.path.getsize()`, but I decided not to introduce any more complexity, just circumvent the reading.

pullRequest.title: ReCaptcha field testing mode documentation
pullRequest.body:
Updated ReCaptcha field docstring to clarify testing behaviour.

Should be harder for people using the validator to miss that it is skipped since they will not have to check for this specific one behaving differently in the docs.

- fixes #645
